self_report.reflection: Setting area(A) = area(B) gives the clean condition ∫₀^{x₂}(c - f(x))dx = 0, leading to c = x₂ - (3/4)x₂³. Combined with c = 2x₂ - 3x₂³ on the curve, this yields x₂ = 2/3 and c = 4/9. The asserted 2/9 is exactly half the correct value.
self_report.notes: Direct integration with the standard 'net signed area = 0' trick gives c = 4/9 unambiguously.
